---
name: Stack / platform request
about: Request documentation or a template for a new stack
title: '[STACK] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What stack or platform?**
e.g. Ruby on Rails, Rust Axum, SvelteKit + PocketBase

**Why should it be in DevForge?**
Who uses it, what's the use case.

**Do you want to contribute it yourself?**
- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR
- [ ] No, just requesting
